title: astrantia eryngioides
intro: Astrantia eryngioides, also known as the meadowsweet or love flower, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Astrantia eryngioides include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, making it useful in treating digestive issues and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Astrantia eryngioides include alleviating symptoms of colds, fever, and arthritis, as well as providing antioxidant properties. Astrantia eryngioides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a dried extract or in combination with other herbs.
